name: The Back Nine Golf | Fort Lauderdale, FL
about: The Back Nine Golf in Fort Lauderdale, FL, is a golf simulator venue that offers a high-tech practice and playing experience. The venue utilizes advanced simulator technology to provide golfers with a realistic indoor golfing experience, suitable for both casual play and serious practice. While specific details about amenities and pricing are not available from the provided context, the venue appears to focus on providing a modern and accessible golf simulation environment for golfers of various skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for realistic play
Variety of features suitable for different skill levels
Convenient indoor location for all weather play
Available for private events and group bookings

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted, but the venue offers food and beverages for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and has features suitable for children.
